title: Fix memory leak in data processor
body:
## Description
The data processor is leaking memory when processing large files

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Process a file larger than 100MB
2. Memory usage increases
3. Process never releases memory

## Expected Behavior
Memory should be released after processing

## Stack Trace
```
MemoryError: Out of memory at line 42
```

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Memory leak fixed
- [ ] Tests added to prevent regression
- [ ] Performance improved
